title: Foundation and History
content:
Foundation and History

Istanbul Esenyurt University

; T.R. Established by the Yeşilköy 2001 Education, Culture and Health Foundation in accordance with the provisions of its Constitution, Higher Education Law No. 2547 and Regulation on Foundation Higher Education Institutions, with the Law No. 6492 published in the Official Gazette No. It is a higher education institution that aims to train participatory, innovative and entrepreneurial individuals who are committed to the basic principles and values ​​of our Constitution.

Our university started its education life in the fall semester of 2013-2014 academic year by taking 296 students with 6 departments and 8 programs with an additional placement system.

In our university, 4 Faculties, namely the Faculty of Business and Management Sciences, Engineering and Architecture, Arts and Social Sciences and Health Sciences, 2 Schools of the School of Physical Education and Sports and the School of Applied Sciences, 2 Vocational Schools of the Health Services Vocational School and the Vocational School, There is 1 Institute, one of which is the Graduate Education Institute.

This content was updated on 01/07/2024.
